name: Cheese Filled Jumbo Shells
directions: Cook pasta according to package directions.
Combine cheeses, eggs, parsley, oregano, salt and pepper.
Fill each pasta shell with about 2 tablespoons of the cheese mixture.
Spread a thin layer of sauce on bottom of a 13x9 inch baking pan.
Place pasta in the pan; cover with remaining sauce.
Sprinkle with additional Parmesan cheese, if desired.
Cover with aluminum foil.
Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 35 minutes or until hot and bubbly.

similar.name: Caesar Tuna Salad in Pasta Shells
Southwestern Shells With Chicken and Corn

name: Mexican Pasta
directions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add pasta and cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until al dente; drain.

While pasta is cooking, heat olive oil over medium heat in a large skillet. Cook onions and pepper in oil until lightly browned, 10 minutes. Stir in corn and heat through. Stir in black beans, tomatoes, salsa, olives, taco seasoning and salt and pepper and cook until thoroughly heated, 5 minutes.
Toss sauce with cooked pasta and serve.

similar.name: Southwestern Shells With Chicken and Corn
Caesar Tuna Salad in Pasta Shells

name: Caesar Tuna Salad in Pasta Shells
directions: Cook and drain pasta shells as directed on package.
Rinse with cold water; drain.
Mix tuna, tomatoes, green beans and olive in medium bowl.
Mix mayonnaise, Caesar dressing and pepper; toss with tuna mixture.
Spoon about 1/4 cup tuna mixture into each pasta shell.
Arrange shells on lettuce leaves.
Sprinkle with eggs.

similar.name: Southwestern Shells With Chicken and Corn

name: Countryside Pasta Salad
ingredients: diced tomatoes with garlic and olive oil
directions: In a large bowl combine pasta, tomatoes, bacon, onions, peppers, cheese, and basil.  Drizzle with the dressing and toss until thoroughly mixed.  Season with salt and pepper to taste.

similar.name: Caesar Tuna Salad in Pasta Shells
Southwestern Shells With Chicken and Corn

name: Southwestern Shells With Chicken and Corn
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Cook and drain pasta according to package directions.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat. Cook chicken until lightly browned.  Sprinkle with flour and stir while cooking for 1 more minute.
Reduce heat, slowly add the milk and cook for about 5 minutes or until milk is slightly thickened.
Remove from heat, add one cup cheese, corn, salsa and green chilies.  Add in hot pasta and mix well.
Place in lightly greased baking dish.  Sprinkle the remaining cheese on top and bake 20-25 minutes.

similar.name: Caesar Tuna Salad in Pasta Shells

name: Kamaboko Salad
directions: Cut the  crab sticks (kamaboko) into thin slices horizontally.
Mix all the ingredients together (kamaboko, celery, noodles, green onions, salt, pepper and mayonnaise.)
Serve on lettuce leaves.
